offer: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate progress reporting causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated progress reports instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated reporting tools.
problem: Inaccurate progress reporting and estimates lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project management
Engage on Indie Hackers about construction workflow challenges
DM outreach to contractors with demo video links
Participate in forums sharing construction management tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for job site updates and template-based progress report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
